creator: mglaum@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
I haven't been able to reproduce your error-free running of cad/pcb.

If I install a clean 6.1, update the cvs ports directory and install both
x11/gnome2 and then cad/pcb via the ports, I still get the same error
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol
"pthread_getschedparam".

So did you try the "pcb program's menu -> File -> load netlist file"?
